name: Jumping Thirds
description: Major thirds — the building block of melodies. Sing the root, jump up a third, come back.

feedback.intro: You'll hear a root note, then a jump up by a major third (4 semitones), then a minor third. Sing each one cleanly.
feedback.tip: Major thirds are everywhere in music — 'Kumbaya', the first two notes of 'When the Saints'. Training your ear to hear them makes everything easier.
